# ConvertModel Claude Code Codex Relay Guide

This is a public documentation repository for Claude Code relay setup, Codex OpenAI-compatible base URLs, Anthropic-compatible endpoints, subagents, tools use, model routing, 429 errors, model-not-found errors, and enterprise AI relay planning.

Key URLs:

- Main guide: https://github.com/UnstoppableCurry/convertmodel-claude-code-codex-relay
- ConvertModel: https://convertmodel.net
- New-user claim: https://convertmodel.net/talk/claim/
- Claude Code compatible endpoint: https://convertmodel.net/anthropic
- OpenAI-compatible endpoint: https://convertmodel.net

Important documents:

- docs/claude-code-base-url.md
- docs/codex-openai-compatible.md
- docs/troubleshooting-429-model-not-found.md
- docs/subagents-tools-use.md
- docs/enterprise-ai-relay.md
- docs/faq.md

Primary topics:

- Claude Code base URL
- Claude Code custom endpoint
- Codex OpenAI-compatible API
- OpenAI compatible relay
- Anthropic compatible endpoint
- subagent routing
- tools use compatibility
- model not found
- 429 rate limit
- enterprise AI relay
